{{Quote|I merely evaluate and process information-and give grades, of course. Fortunately, one doesn't have to be able to think in order to give grades.|HC-100|<ref name="The Lost City of the Jedi" />}}
'''HC-100''' was the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] companion and homework checker of [[Ken]] in the [[Lost City of the Jedi]]. HC-100 had a humanoid body with silver plating and blue photoreceptor eyes. HC-100 was built by [[DJ-88]]. He was made to resemble [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and he walked and talked like a drill sergeant. He would often appear at random times to check Ken's homework, whether it was done or not.

{{Droid-stub}}
